steps.title: Free Inspection
steps.body: We assess your roof and give you an honest picture of what it needs. No obligation.

steps.title: Estimate Review
steps.body: We walk you through the written, itemized scope. Every question answered. No pressure.

steps.title: Install Day
steps.body: Crew arrives on time, completes the full job, and runs a magnetic sweep for nails.

steps.title: Final Walkthrough
steps.body: We inspect the completed roof with you. You sign off, we clean up, and we're done.
